rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED. (CW)

GRANT American's Motion for Summary Adjudication as follows: American does not have a duty to indemnify for the portion of the settlement which represents earned but unpaid wages, i.e. %50 of each claim. (CW)

GRANT Coca-Cola's Motion for Summary Adjudication re duty. There is no triable issue of fact re coverage for 'workplace torts' or whether Evans asserted claims for misrepresentation under 17200 and coercion under Labor?206.5 [improperly obtaining release. American has a duty to indemnify as follows: (1) American has a duty to indemnify for the portion of the settlement that represents attorney fees; (2) American has a duty to indemnify for the portion of the settlement that represents cost of class administration; (3) American has a duty to indemnify for the portion of the settlement which represents compensatory damages, i.e. 50% of each claim. DENY American's 437c(h) request because affidavit filed in support fails to show why deposition is necessary, why Coca-Cola's employees could not have made declarations, and facts showing Taylor is likely to offer deposition testimony contrary to her declaration. DENY Coca-Cola's MSA regarding breach. This is not an appropriate issue for adjudication under 437c(f)(1). (CW)

OVERRULE AS TO 1ST AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE U.S. SUPREME COURT AUTHORITY OF BASIC SCUTTLES THE REASONING OF ELDRIDGE AND INS. UNDERWRITERS. CAUSE OF ACTION PROPERLY PLEAD DAMAGES AND CAUSE OF ACTION PROPER AGAINST GOLDHABER BECAUSE COMPLAINT PLEADS EXCLUSIVE KNOWLEDGE. OVERRULE AS TO 2ND & 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION UNDER HOWARD. OVERRULE AS TO 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. OVERRULE AS TO 6TH. COURT ALSO OVERRULE SPECIAL DEMURRER FOR UNCERTAINTY BECAUSE CAUSE OF ACTION SEGREGATES DISTINCT CLAIMS AND EFFECTUATES PURPOSES OF CRC 201(i) AND 312(g). OVERRULE AS TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER ROSKIND. (PB)
